description: A rocketry team has noticed strange, transient acceleration spikes in the simulation data of their multi-stage rocket. As the simulation engineer, perform a numerical sensitivity study on the base rocket at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/sensitivity_study.ork to determine if the solver's integration time step is too coarse. Conduct three flight simulations using time steps of 0.1s, 0.05s, and 0.01s. Export the resulting time-series flight data (including Time, Altitude, and Acceleration) as CSV files to /home/ga/Documents/exports/. Save the modified design and provide a sensitivity report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/sensitivity_report.txt that lists the maximum acceleration for each simulation and evaluates the prediction's sensitivity to the time step.
